title: AI Business Automation — Marceau Solutions
subtitle: Your Business Runs Itself While You Sleep
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## What We Do

We build AI systems that automate lead generation, follow-up, customer service, and operations for small businesses in Southwest Florida. Every system is custom-built, fully managed, and guaranteed to deliver results.

**No templates. No DIY platforms. We build it, we run it, you grow.**

---

## Our Services

| Service | Setup | Monthly | What You Get |
|---|---|---|---|
| **AI Lead Engine** | $2,500 | $500/mo | Automated lead capture + qualification + CRM integration. Leads flow in 24/7 without you lifting a finger. |
| **Smart Follow-Up System** | $2,000 | $500/mo | Multi-channel nurture sequences (email + SMS). No lead falls through the cracks ever again. |
| **AI Receptionist** | $3,000 | $750/mo | 24/7 customer response + appointment booking. Every call answered, every inquiry handled — instantly. |
| **Operations Autopilot** | $2,500 | $500/mo | Automated invoicing, scheduling, and review collection. Your back office runs itself. |
| **Full Business Automation Stack** | $7,500 | $1,500/mo | Everything above — bundled and integrated. The complete hands-off business system. |

---

## How It Works

1. **Discovery Call (15 min)** — We identify exactly where you're losing time and money
2. **Custom Blueprint** — You get a clear plan showing what we'll automate and the ROI
3. **We Build It (7 days)** — Your system goes live in one week, not one quarter
4. **We Manage It** — Ongoing optimization, monitoring, and support included

---

## Our Guarantee

**10 qualified leads in 30 days — or we work free until it does.**

No long-term contracts. No hidden fees. If it doesn't work, you don't pay.

---

## Why Marceau Solutions?

- **Built personally** — Every system is built by me, not outsourced to a junior team
- **5 clients per quarter** — Limited capacity ensures white-glove service
- **Naples-based** — I'm local, I understand your market, and I'm a phone call away
- **Full-stack AI expertise** — Not a "Zapier consultant" — real AI engineering
- **Proven systems** — The same automation stack that runs my own businesses

---

## Ready to Automate Your Business?

**Book a free 15-minute discovery call** and I'll show you exactly how much time and money you're leaving on the table.
